creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
I have checked, the problem looks like it is entirely in CMake's find_package(ZLIB), not opencolorio:

```
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20 FATAL_ERROR)
project(demo VERSION 1.0 LANGUAGES C)

find_package(ZLIB REQUIRED)

message(STATUS "::")
message(STATUS ":: ZLIB_VERSION=${ZLIB_VERSION}")
message(STATUS ":: ZLIB_VERSION_STRING=${ZLIB_VERSION_STRING}")
message(STATUS "::")
```

On 13-, with ZLIB 1.2.13, prints something normal, and on 14-, with ZLIB 1.3, adds the #define garbage to the value of variable ZLIB_VERSION.
